stories.title: It's official: Germany are no longer a soccer supe...
stories.summary: Germany expected Paraguay to be "an uncomfortable opponent," but the South American side was so much more that it ended Die Mannschaft's World Cup.

stories.title: VAR review: Why Germany were wrongly denied extra-...
stories.summary: We are examining major incidents and explaining the process in terms of VAR protocol and the laws of the game.

stories.title: Morocco win shootout to send Netherlands home
stories.summary: Morocco beat the Netherlands in a penalty shootout after the match finished 1-1 to advance to the round of 16 on Monday night.

stories.title: Sources: RFA Duren to meet with Lakers, Kings
stories.summary: Pistons restricted free agent Jalen Duren has meetings set up with the Lakers and Kings when free agency begins Tuesday.

stories.title: Paraguay stun Germany on pens after VAR drama
stories.summary: Kai Havertz, Nick Woltemade and Jonathan Tah missed crucial penalties as Germany were eliminated from the World Cup in a shootout by Paraguay.
